rules: Use Yatra One or Cormorant Garamond for all primary hero and section headings.
Use Manrope for readable English body text and data tables, blending modern utility with elegant headings.
Ensure Devanagari text uses Yatra One (display) or Hind (reading) specifically, and falls back correctly.
Never use Inter or standard safe fonts for headings.
For cryptographic signatures and Ed25519 certs, use JetBrains Mono or Roboto Mono with tight letter spacing for that 'technical proof' aesthetic.
Heading typography MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Maximum H1 size is text-5xl or text-6xl. Do not use text-7xl+.
No generic full-screen gradients. Apply the brand gradient only to specific emphasis items like Trust Badges, CTA buttons, or fine 1px decorative borders.
The UI background is primarily Warm Ivory and Cream. Do not use pure white (#FFFFFF).
Use Deep Charcoal (#1A1514) for primary text. Never use pure black.
Status colors for the Verification UI must be high-contrast and authoritative.

visual_enhancers.borders: Use 1px solid borders in #D4AF37 (Gold) with varying opacities (20% to 50%) for sections and cards to create 'thin gold linework'.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal. Use soft ambient shadows for elevated cards, or completely flat designs with crisp gold borders.
visual_enhancers.textures: Incorporate subtle noise textures or faint sacred-geometry watermark backgrounds in the Public QR Verification page.
visual_enhancers.radii: Restrained corner radii (0px, 2px, or max 4px). Keep it architectural, sharp, and premium.

layouts_and_grids.marketing_pages: Use Mode A 'Tetris' Grid for home and category pages. Asymmetrical product discovery. Let high-res product photos overlap structural borders.
layouts_and_grids.verification_page: Use Mode B 'High Density Grid' (Bento Style). Drill-down metadata panels for certificate details, Ed25519 signatures, and provenance chain. Every pixel utilized. Sharp corners, 1px gold borders.
layouts_and_grids.trust_panel: On Product Detail Page, the Trust Panel must sit immediately next to or below the primary CTA. It must look like a secure cryptographic widget.
layouts_and_grids.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, or p-16 for main sections. Let the UI breathe to feel premium and reverent.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped or sharp rectangular buttons. Primary buttons can use the subtle saffron-to-maroon gradient or solid Maroon with Ivory text. Always have hover lift.
components.cards: Flat, rectangular cards with 1px gold borders. No heavy shadows. High use of 'Grid Borders' style where borders collapse to form a continuous grid.
components.trust_badges: Use shield or certificate icons. Green shield for 'AUTHENTIC'. Use Phosphor Icons for elegant duotone weight.
components.navigation: Solid or Glassmorphism background on sticky header (e.g., bg-[#FBFBF9]/80 backdrop-blur-xl). Never fully transparent. Include Devanagari script elements.
components.verification_status: Crown jewel widget. Use drill-down accordions for 'Lab Report', 'Temple Energization', 'Pooja Recording', and 'Ed25519 Signature'. Must look highly polished.

motion.general: Smooth and reverent. Use Framer Motion for subtle fade-ins and 1px border reveals.
motion.interactions: Hover states on products must slightly scale the image and reveal the 'Verify Provenance' link.
motion.verification_animation: When scanning/loading a QR code, show a scanning line or cryptographic decoding animation before revealing the 'AUTHENTIC' green state.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over the ivory/cream background passes APCA/WCAG AA.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY. Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, navigation links, trust panels, certificate links, and verification status badges.
accessibility.motion_preference: Respect 'prefers-reduced-motion' for all scanning or decoding animations.

media.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react for high-end, elegant duotone or light weights. Avoid heavy or cartoonish icons.

homepage_hero.description: Gold Indian temple architecture details for trust narrative

gemstone_category.description: Close-up of a luxury sapphire gemstone

certificate_background.description: Ornate gold border with crests on a cream background, to be used subtly in the verification UI

verification_pattern.description: Artistic marbled gold pattern for the Verification UI background (use at 5-10% opacity)

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building GEMORA, a premium, first-party spiritual store emphasizing cryptographic authenticity. Avoid generic e-commerce templates.
The UI must feel 'sacred and reverent'. Use the exact colors provided: Warm Ivory, Cream, Saffron, Gold, Maroon.

Implement the 'Public QR Verification Page' as the absolute crown jewel of this app. Use bento-grid layouts to display cryptographic hashes, temple videos, and lab report PDFs with high technical precision mixed with luxury aesthetics.
Use Shadcn UI components but strip away the default 'Vercel/Stripe' look. Customize them to have sharp 0px or 2px radii and 1px gold/maroon borders.
For the Trust Panel on the Product Detail Page, build a visually distinct card that lists the Serial #, Ed25519 signature, Lab Report, and Energization info prominently.
Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for elegant icons (e.g. Shields, Certificates, QR Codes, Play buttons for pooja).
Do NOT use pure white backgrounds. Ensure all main surfaces are slightly tinted ivory.
Add data-testid attributes to all major interactive elements for testing.
Render Devanagari text correctly. Ensure font fallbacks are set in Tailwind.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Make creative, distinctive frontends.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy, but keep the overall UI clean and sharp.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
You MUST NOT apply universal transitions (e.g. `transition: all`). Add transitions only for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. Do not add `.App { text-align: center; }`.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Use the exact provided image URLs. NEVER use placeholder URLs like via.placeholder.com or generic grey blocks.
